acceptance: Deliverable is specific enough for AI implementation without choosing scope.
No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data is used.
Matter-first, DMS ownership, permission, audit, and tenant isolation invariants are preserved where applicable.
Hermes H27 evidence or blocked reason can be recorded.
Claude C27 can independently review architecture, security, missing tests, and go/no-go status.
